# Contact Me

I would be happy to connect regarding internships, graduate opportunities, collaborations, or networking.

## Details

- **Name:** Esha Esha  
- **Location:** Dublin, Ireland  
- **Email:** esha.esha2@mail.dcu.ie  
- **Phone:** 089 212 8736  

## Professional Links

- LinkedIn: [linkedin.com/in/esha-2a036532a](https://www.linkedin.com/in/esha-2a036532a)
- GitHub: [github.com/Esha-Dahiya](https://github.com/Esha-Dahiya)

## References

Available upon request.

::: {.callout-important}
Thank you for visiting my portfolio.
:::
